content.en:
"I can't understand this magic circle!"

The Lord of Time shook his head.

Although he had also reached the level of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm not long ago, he didn't know what the extreme path of the Extreme Realm was, so he naturally didn't understand this magic circle.

Even if he was asked to comprehend for countless years, he didn't understand.

Soon, the cultivators of the major forces came.

The forces of the Nameless Mountain, the Eternal Pavilion, the Xuannu Sect, the Boundless Chamber of Commerce, the Time and Space Exchange, the Hall of Eternal Life, the Natural Calamity Alliance, and the Strange Circle all sent the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers with a group of cultivators.

Each faction has more than a dozen quotas, which is about the same as the quota of the Daoless Tower.

It didn't take long for the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm of the major forces to discuss and make a move, wanting to open a space-time passage through this space-time fragment, allowing these cultivators to enter this space-time fragment.

Rumble!!!!

Many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers made a move.

In an instant, a space-time passage appeared on this circle.

"Let's go inside!"

The Lord of the Pathless said.

Ye Tian and the others nodded, and instantly flew into the space-time passage and entered the space-time fragments inside this magic circle.

......

As soon as he entered this space-time fragment, Ye Tian sensed the aura of the Extreme Dao, and it was obvious that there were many Extreme Dao treasures here.

This space-time fragment is very large, and there are many traces of battle in the void.

Ye Tian didn't know if there were any other dangers in this space-time fragment, so he was very cautious.

After all, once it falls, it loses the opportunity to enter again.

Although his strength is very strong, this is the remnant of the Demon Dragon Tower after all, and even if there is a means here that can threaten the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, it is very normal.

So, you have to be careful.

Soon, Ye Tian found a fragment of the palace, and found several extreme treasures in it, but the value was average.

This space-time region can also be regarded as a treasure land, so there are a lot of resources here.

However, Ye Tian couldn't look down on most of the resources here.

Of course, many super-perfect controllers and imaginary perfect controllers can see it, and they are extremely excited.

Among them was the Lord of Time, who was extremely excited at the moment, and there were too many resources to help him.

Thundered!!!!

The breath of the outbreak of battle came.

"It's the battle of the perfect controller of the real realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Obviously, it was the Perfect Masters of the True Realm who found something good, otherwise the battle would not have broken out.

At this moment, those super-perfect controllers did not dare to approach there, otherwise they would not even be able to withstand the aftermath.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled over to see the situation.

Soon, Ye Tian sensed the two True Realm Perfect Controllers who were fighting.

One of them is the Lord of the Heavenly River of the Daoless Tower, and the other is the Lord of the Black Ape of the Natural Calamity Alliance.

The Lord of the Black Ape is not a cultivator of the Eternal Ruins, but a special creature at the end of the realm, who has cultivated to the realm of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm and joined the Natural Calamity Alliance.

"Lord of the Black Ape, this treasure is the first thing I saw!"

The Lord of the Heavenly River said angrily.

"Lord of the Heavenly River, I also said that I saw it first, in short, whoever grabbed it will be whoever's!"

The treasure they were talking about was a spear stuck in the corpse of an extreme creature, but the spear was broken and could only be considered a remnant.

However, this spear is not an ordinary weapon, but an extremely rare treasure.

In other words, this is a mutilated Extreme Treasure.

In the end of the world, some barren Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers do not have Extreme Dao Treasures, but you can imagine the value of Extreme Path Treasures, and a broken Extreme Realm Treasure is enough to make the True Realm Perfect Controllers of the End of the Realm fight desperately!

"Lord of the Heavenly River, I will stop the Lord of the Black Ape for you, and you take this broken Extreme Dao Treasure!"

Ye Tian sent a message to the Lord of Tianhe, and immediately took action.

I saw Ye Tian appear in front of the Lord of the Black Ape, punched the Lord of the Black Ape away, and then cast the Extreme Prison Prison, instantly restraining the Lord of the Black Ape.

At this time, the Lord of the Heavenly River seized the opportunity and collected the mutilated Extreme Path Treasure Spear.

It was also at this time that the Lord of the Black Ape turned into a billion-foot Extreme Dao body, exploded all his strength, and bombarded dozens of times with all his might, which shattered Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Prison.

However, it was too late, and the mutilated Extreme Treasure had already fallen into the hands of the Lord of the Heavenly River.

"Lord of Endless, you dare to spoil my good deeds!!!"

The Lord of the Black Ape said angrily.

"What, you want to fight me?" Ye Tian said coldly.

"Look for death!"

The Lord of the Black Ape was furious.

A mutilated Extreme Dao Treasure, how valuable it is, if he obtains such a mutilated Extreme Dao Treasure, if he spends some precious materials to repair it, it is enough to exert a part of the power of the Extreme Dao Treasure, and his strength will inevitably increase.

The Lord of the Heavenly River was about to help Ye Tian deal with the Lord of the Black Ape, but was stopped by Ye Tian.

"Just a black ape master, I can deal with it alone!"

Ye Tian just wanted to test his top Extreme Dao mastery technique, Extreme Mang Sword Light!

Airplanes!

The extreme sword light with extreme sharpness locked onto the Lord of the Black Ape, shattering all time and space, and instantly penetrating away.

At this moment, the Lord of the Black Ape felt the breath of death.

"Block me!"

The Lord of the Black Ape unleashed his famous Extreme Dao Control Technique, the Dark Ninefold Armor, plus a top-notch defense-type super-grade perfect treasure to protect himself.

However, under the Extreme Mang Sword Light, the Super Perfect Treasure was penetrated, and the Dark Ninefold Armor was not blocked, and was torn apart by the Extreme Mang Sword Light.

Poof!

The body of the Lord of the Black Ape was pierced by Ye Tian's extreme sword light, and wisps of sword light continued to erode the body of the Lord of the Black Ape.

"Top Extreme Mastery !!"

The Lord of the Black Ape was shocked.

As far as he knew, in the end of the realm, only the top True Realm Perfect Masters had mastered a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, and Ye Tian's Realm Perfection Masters had actually created such a top-notch Extreme Dao Control Technique, and the power was extremely terrifying, and it seemed to contain a trace of Extreme Extreme Dao power?

Maybe it was his delusion, but the power of this blow had reached the level of a top True Realm perfect master.

And he was just an ordinary True Realm Perfect Controller, and Ye Tian's sword hit him hard.

If there were a few more swords, he would definitely fall.

"Run!"

The Lord of the Black Ape has run.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill, because there was no need, the Lord of the Black Ape was a special creature at the end of the realm, and he took a path similar to that of an extreme creature, so he didn't have a clone.

If you kill the Lord of the Black Ape, then the Lord of the Black Ape will really fall.

He didn't want to be an enemy of the Scourge Alliance at the moment, after all, the Scourge Alliance also had several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

At this moment, the Lord of the Heavenly River was shocked.

"Lord of Infinity, you actually defeated the Lord of the Black Ape!!!"

The Lord of the Heavenly River said in disbelief.
